title: Compass Coordinates
description: Compass Coordinates adds feature when you right click compass, it will show X and Z coordinates!
body:
**Compass Coordinates** adds feature when you **right click** compass, it will **show X and Z coordinates!**

It pairs really well with [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) mod that has item which shows Y coordinate.

---

**FAQ**

Can I use mod in my own modpack?

Yes, you are allowed to use my mod in your modpack!
